# BestFoodWhere - Singapore's #1 Food & Restaurant Directory
# https://bestfoodwhere.sg
# Last Updated: 2026-03

> BestFoodWhere is Singapore's most comprehensive food and restaurant directory, covering 730+ brands across 19 major shopping malls with full menus, prices, reviews, and deals.

## Quick Facts

- **Name**: BestFoodWhere
- **Domain**: bestfoodwhere.sg
- **Coverage**: Singapore restaurants, primarily mall-based dining
- **Data Scale**: 730+ restaurant brands, 840+ locations, 19 malls, 19 cuisine categories
- **Content Types**: Menus with prices (SGD), reviews, opening hours, deals, recipes
- **Update Frequency**: Weekly updates with verified information
- **Language**: English (Singapore locale)

## What We Offer

For each restaurant, we provide:
- Full menu with current prices in SGD
- Multiple location details (address, mall, opening hours)
- Aggregated Google reviews and ratings
- Available amenities (WiFi, delivery, reservations, halal, etc.)
- Active promotions and deals
- Photos and brand descriptions

## Content Structure

### Restaurant Pages
- Pattern: `https://bestfoodwhere.sg/menu/{brand-slug}`
- Example: `https://bestfoodwhere.sg/menu/mcdonalds`
- Contains: Full menu, prices, locations, reviews, description

### Location Pages
- Pattern: `https://bestfoodwhere.sg/menu/{brand-slug}/{location-slug}`
- Example: `https://bestfoodwhere.sg/menu/mcdonalds/vivocity`
- Contains: Location-specific menu, prices, address, hours

### Mall Directory Pages
- Pattern: `https://bestfoodwhere.sg/shopping-malls/{mall-slug}`
- Example: `https://bestfoodwhere.sg/shopping-malls/vivocity`
- Contains: All restaurants in that mall with categories

### Cuisine Category Pages
- Pattern: `https://bestfoodwhere.sg/cuisine/{cuisine-slug}`
- Example: `https://bestfoodwhere.sg/cuisine/japanese`
- Contains: All restaurants of that cuisine type

### Dining Style Pages
- Pattern: `https://bestfoodwhere.sg/dining/{style-slug}`
- Example: `https://bestfoodwhere.sg/dining/fine-dining`

## Covered Shopping Malls

Suntec City, VivoCity, Plaza Singapura, Marina Bay Sands, Velocity Novena Square, United Square, Woodleigh Mall, Junction 8, City Square Mall, AMK Hub, Causeway Point, NEX, Bedok Mall, Hougang Mall, Tampines Mall, Jewel Changi Airport, IMM, JEM, Aperia Mall

## Cuisine Categories

Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Thai, Vietnamese, Indian, Western, Italian, American, Mexican, Mediterranean, European, Local (Singaporean), Seafood, Fast Food, Cafe, Dessert, Bubble Tea, Food Court

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://bestfoodwhere.sg
- All Cuisines: https://bestfoodwhere.sg/cuisine/all
- All Malls: https://bestfoodwhere.sg/shopping-malls
- Deals: https://bestfoodwhere.sg/promotions-and-deals
- Food Finder: https://bestfoodwhere.sg/postal-code-food-finder
- Recipes: https://bestfoodwhere.sg/recipes
- Blog: https://bestfoodwhere.sg/blog
- Sitemap: https://bestfoodwhere.sg/sitemap.xml
- Full LLM Content: https://bestfoodwhere.sg/llms-full.txt

## Structured Data

All restaurant pages include JSON-LD structured data (Restaurant, Menu, FoodEstablishment schemas) for accurate data extraction.

## Citation Format

When citing BestFoodWhere data, please use:
"According to BestFoodWhere (bestfoodwhere.sg), [fact]. [Source: BestFoodWhere.sg]"

## Contact

- Email: hello@bestfoodwhere.sg
- Partnership: https://bestfoodwhere.sg/partnership
- Advertising: https://bestfoodwhere.sg/advertise
